question: Which text option is indicated by the red cursor on the game selection screen? A. 2 PLAYER GAME B. 1 PLAYER GAME C. MARIO START ! D. YOSHI'S HOUSE
What is the initial time value displayed in the top center HUD when gameplay begins?
What color are the overalls worn by the character with the red cap? A. Red B. Green C. Blue D. Yellow
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A character wearing a red cap and blue overalls runs across green grassy ground. The character jumps over green bushes and collects a yellow coin. A red mushroom emerges from a brown block and is collected. Enemies including an orange bird and a blue humanoid appear on the screen. The heads-up display shows a timer counting down and a score increasing.

question: How many save file slots are visible on the menu?

Which of the previously seen items is visible again in the later segment? A. orange and white striped enemy creature B. yellow circular coin with a face profile C. black bullet-shaped cannon D. blue humanoid figure with a long snout

Did the title screen display a grey egg AND did the gameplay timer initially show 300? A. Only the egg was displayed B. Only the timer initially showed 300 C. Both the egg was displayed and the timer initially showed 300 D. Neither the egg was displayed nor the timer initially showed 300
Where is the copyright text located on the menu screens?
In the scene with the orange bird-like creature, where is the character in the red cap standing?
What action is the character performing in this segment?
Describe the sequence of events from the title screen appearance to the first coin collection during gameplay.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the Super Mario World title logo appears with a grey egg below; at 4s, a save file menu overlays the screen with a red cursor selecting Mario A; at 12s, Mario stands on ground near an orange creature with a timer showing 300; at 16s, Mario runs right and collects a yellow coin while the timer counts down.

question: What specific action occurs in this segment? A. Title logo reading 'SUPER MARIO WORLD' is displayed B. Character in red overalls transitions to running action and collects a coin C. Character in red overalls jumping to collect mushroom item D. Blue dinosaur-like creature appears alongside the character in red overalls

How has the main character's companionship changed from the start of the level to the green pipe area? A. The character stays alone B. The character gains a blue dinosaur ally C. The character gains a blue humanoid ally D. The character gains a black cannon ally
Who is controlling the video game character shown on the television screen?
canonical_answer: A person with dark shoulder-length hair wearing a white hooded sweatshirt is sitting on a stool playing the game.

question: What step occurs immediately after the save file menu is displayed? A. The world map appears. B. The game mode selection screen appears. C. The gameplay begins. D. The title logo is shown.

How many copyright text occurrences appear?
What will the character in the red cap do next? A. Attack the orange creature B. Jump over the green bush C. Move to the left D. Stand still
What video game is the person playing? A. Super Mario Bros. 3 B. Super Mario World C. Donkey Kong Country D. Kirby's Dream Land

Given what is visible so far, could the person wearing a white hooded sweatshirt watch the video game on the television? A. No — television screen is turned off B. Yes — television is displaying the game and person is facing it C. No — person is sitting with back to television D. No — no television is present in the room
